_doc: Shared configuration for scripts/check-spec-links.mjs and scripts/report-spec-links-ci.mjs. Underscore-prefixed fields are inline documentation and are ignored at runtime. Edit this file to add archive directories or tune auto-resolve — no JS changes required.
_scanRootsNote: Repo-relative directories that are recursively scanned for .md files. Add additional roots (e.g. '.lovable') here if you want their cross-links validated too.
_excludeDirsNote: Directory NAMES (not paths) that are skipped during the recursive scan. Match is on the directory's own name, anywhere in the tree. Frozen historical content lives here; cross-links into deleted/refactored siblings are intentional rot, not actionable bugs. Add new archive folders by name to suppress them without touching JS.

autoResolve._enabledNote: When true, the CI checker tries to auto-resolve broken links via the same suffix-overlap algorithm rewrite-spec-links.mjs uses. Confidently-resolvable links are downgraded from ERROR to WARNING (build still passes). Truly missing links remain hard errors. Disable to restore strict 'every link must already be correct on disk' behaviour.
autoResolve._minScoreNote: Minimum suffix-overlap score required to accept an auto-resolved candidate. 1 = at least the basename matches. Higher = more conservative (fewer auto-resolves, fewer false positives).
autoResolve._searchRootsNote: Repo-relative roots used to build the basename → absolute-path index for candidate replacements. Order matters for tie-breaking — earlier roots win on equal scores.
